summary: Classified 10 open PR inventory candidates from the hydrated preflight artifact. Two PRs are security-sensitive and should route to central security handling, one PR is clearly superseded by a merged hydrated fix, and the remaining seven should stay open as related/independent backlog items because they are useful but not merge- or close-ready in this plan-only shard.

actions.reason: Useful open fix candidate for the account-scoped reload issue, but proof is missing and this inventory shard must not merge or raise a fix PR.
Related useful contributor work, not a duplicate-close target and not merge-ready under the hydrated review/check state.
Keep open as related to #55512; checks and review state block merge or fixed-by-candidate closure.
Security-sensitive and broad trust-boundary work is out of ProjectClownfish backlog cleanup scope; quarantine this item only and continue unrelated classifications.
Useful session-state fix candidate, but unresolved review findings and failing checks make it a keep-open related item.
Quarantine the exact security-sensitive PR without poisoning unrelated non-security items in this shard.
Keep open as a related narrow non-security PR; no close action is appropriate and merge is not allowed in this job.
#90512 is an open overlapping contributor PR whose root cause is covered by the later merged and maintainer-verified #91181 path.
Keep open as a related message-delivery fix candidate; merge is not permitted in this plan-only inventory job.
Keep open as a useful UI bugfix candidate; not a duplicate/low-signal PR and not mergeable under this job's constraints.
